scripts.dev: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; STORAGE_DRIVER=${STORAGE_DRIVER:-fs} STORAGE_FS_ROOT=${STORAGE_FS_ROOT:-/Users/huyin/www/hao-hao-study} STORAGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=${STORAGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} next dev --port 3000
scripts.build: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; STORAGE_DRIVER=${STORAGE_DRIVER:-fs} STORAGE_FS_ROOT=${STORAGE_FS_ROOT:-/Users/huyin/www/hao-hao-study} STORAGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=${STORAGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} next build
scripts.start: if [ -f ../../.env ]; then set -a; . ../../.env; set +a; fi; STORAGE_DRIVER=${STORAGE_DRIVER:-fs} STORAGE_FS_ROOT=${STORAGE_FS_ROOT:-/Users/huyin/www/hao-hao-study} STORAGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=${STORAGE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL:-http://localhost:3000} next start --port 3000
